arts.ttl: 'He's got to go': Darren Bent predicts the Arsenal player who Andrea Berta is going to sell first
Tuesday's Premier League predictions including Arsenal vs. Fulham
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Premier League fixtures, including Arsenal vs. Fulham.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal vs Fulham isn't on TV as Sky and TNT Sports select different Premier League games
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta’s Arsenal side play host to highflying London rivals Fulham on Tuesday evening, with the Gunners' title hopes hanging on by the thinnest of threads

arts.ttl: Arsenal line-ups vs Fulham amid Saka and White decisions as striker call made
arts.sum: Canton’s Arsenal XI vs Fulham: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Saka, Merino, Martinelli. Then we begin to ask who indeed would be making way for Saka, and which player starts on the left; does Mikel Merino continue as the club’s main striker?

arts.ttl: Andrea Berta Viktor Gyokeres transfer stance emerges as Arsenal talk gathers momentum
arts.sum: New Arsenal sporting director Andrea Berta reportedly appreciates Sporting Lisbon's Viktor Gyokeres as links with a move to the Gunners gather momentum. "Gyokeres is one of the names on Arsenal's list with [Alexander] Isak (who remains the dream target, but Newcastle insist on keeping him) and Sesko, who costs a similar amount of money," Romano said.

arts.ttl: West Ham star set for 'catch-up effect' amid fresh talk of transfer after Arsenal interest
arts.sum: Mohammed Kudus has not scored since December but West Ham head coach Graham Potter reckons Ghana star, who is now the subject of interest from Saudi Arabia, could soon produce the goods

arts.ttl: Leroy Sane to Arsenal transfer update emerges amid Kudus exit update
arts.sum: With all of that being said, football.london has taken a look at the latest Arsenal transfer news and rumours with Berta getting to work very quickly. Further back, to ease the likely departures of Thomas Partey and Jorginho, Martin Zubimendi looks set join from Real Sociedad with the deal in a good place ahead of the summer, as football.london understands.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta warned off Viktor Gyokeres swoop as final transfer plans emerge
arts.sum: Arsenal and Mikel Arteta have nine games remaining to try and overhaul Liverpool at the Premier League summit starting with a home match against Fulham on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta 'failed' his player after giving green light to Arsenal transfer exit
arts.sum: Emile Smith Rowe will return to the Emirates for the first time since leaving Arsenal last summer as he prepares to play against his boyhood club with Fulham - with Mikel Arteta previously admitting he had regrets over his exit

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal eyeing summer move for Leroy Sané
arts.sum: The 27-year-old is currently on loan at Villa from Manchester United, and the West Midlands club have the option to sign him at the end of the season for a reported £40 million fee. - João Félix is attracting interest from Galatasaray and Saudi Arabia after AC Milan opted not to sign him on a permanent deal this summer, reports Nicolo Schira .
